name: Almond Crumble
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 9 by 5 inch loaf pan.
3. Line the bottom and sides of the pan with waxed paper, leaving about 3 inches overhang at the top.
4. In a large bowl, sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
5. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
6. Remove half of the flour mixture to a medium bowl and set aside.
7. Stir eggs, milk, vanilla extract, and almond extract into the original flour mixture.
8. Beat until blended.
9. Pour about 1 cup batter into the prepared pan.
10. Add almonds, cinnamon, and allspice to the reserved flour mixture and stir well.
11. Sprinkle one-third of the nut mixture over the batter in the pan.
12. Repeat layering twice, ending with the nut mixture.
13. Bake until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 70-80 minutes.
14. Loosen the sides of the loaf pan with a wide spatula.
15. Grasp the waxed paper firmly and pull the loaf from the pan onto a wire rack to cool.
